Episodes.Title: Panic on the Runway
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Mark Burns, Richard McMillan
Episodes.Plot: When a survivable emergency on a grounded plane turns deadly, investigators examine what caused the disaster.

Episodes.Title: Alarming Silence
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Mike Sheehan
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Michael Kremko, Bill Lake
Episodes.Plot: Exploring the crash of Northwest Airlines Flight 255, a McDonnell Douglas MD-82, immediately after takeoff at Detroit Metro Airport on August 16, 1987.

Episodes.Title: Pilot vs. Plane
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Nicholas Kilbertus, Olivier L'Ecuyer
Episodes.Plot: First ever crash of the Airbus A320 on June 26, 1988 in Habsheim, France. Air France flight 296.

Episodes.Title: Cleared for Disaster
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Art Hindle, Seann Gallagher
Episodes.Plot: The 1991 collision of two planes mistakenly sharing one runway raises concerns about over-crowded airports and overburdened traffic controllers.

Episodes.Title: Target Is Destroyed
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Armen Kazazian
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Denis Akiyama, Cecil Law
Episodes.Plot: In 1983, Korean Air Lines Flight 007 accidentally enters the Soviet airspace on a flight from the United States to South Korea. The Soviet interceptors shoot down the passenger jet.

Episodes.Title: Cold Case
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Robert Eaton
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Matthew Cooke, Tre Smith
Episodes.Plot: See how icy conditions, a communication breakdown, and an airline's focus on the bottom line led to disaster - twice.

Episodes.Title: The Final Blow
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Burke Lawrence
Episodes.Plot: A 1992 crash in France's Vosges Mountains is examined, detailing the difficulties in finding the downed plane and then finding reasons for the accident.

Episodes.Title: Cracks in the System
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Kristi Angus, Jarrod MacLean
Episodes.Plot: A Grumman Mallard seaplane operated by Chalk's Ocean Arways (Flight 101) crashes into the sea shortly after takeoff, becoming the first fatal accident of the operator's 90 years in service.
